title: Senior Financial Analyst - Motilal Oswal - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Motilal Oswal - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Motilal Oswal in Surat is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Motilal Oswal:
Motilal Oswal is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Motilal Oswal!
